title: Add beskid_standard submodule as corelib

source.subject: Add beskid_standard submodule as corelib; remove local standard_library implementation

body:
Adds **`beskid_standard`** as the superrepo **corelib** submodule and removes the legacy in-tree `standard_library` implementation.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`3799f21`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/3799f21)
- **Subject:** Add beskid_standard submodule as corelib; remove local standard_library implementation
- **Completed:** 2026-03-17

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Superrepo-side mirror of **corelib-submodule** wiring.
